name: golang-boost
description: Component-aligned Claude Code skill bundle for github.com/xgodev/boost. One plugin, one skill per boost component (boost-start, wrapper/log, wrapper/config, wrapper/publisher, model/errors, factory/echo, factory/pubsub, bootstrap/function, bootstrap/adapter/pubsub, bootstrap/middleware, extra/middleware, plus a maintainer guide). Skills cross-reference via REQUIRED BACKGROUND so Claude only loads the ones relevant to the current task.
